title: JukeboxBoat
description: Server-side mod that adds Boats with Jukeboxes to the game.
body:
This mod works fully server-side!

Adds new variants of boats to the game, simply put any type of boat with a jukebox in the crafting grid to get a boat with jukebox! Shift right click it with a music disc to play it.

P.S: Works great with Happy Ghasts :)

Know limitations:
When a player joins the server or a player unmutes their ingame audio while music is playing , they will not be able to hear the audio until a disc is (re)inserted.
